__inputs.name: DS_PROMETHEUS
__inputs.label: Prometheus
__inputs.description: Prometheus data source for kryten-llm metrics

panels.title: Trigger Fires by Type Over Time
Response Length (chars) with Config Limits
panels.description: Response length in characters. Yellow threshold = configured max message length (255). Shows how close responses come to limits.

panels.title: Trigger Fire Rate
panels.description: Percentage of trigger checks that actually result in a response. High values may mean the bot talks too much.

panels.title: Rate Limit Blocks by Reason Over Time
Active Configuration Limits (Guide Marks for Thresholds)
panels.description: These values come directly from the running service configuration and define the operational boundaries displayed as thresholds in other panels.
